spoilers.title: ⚠️ #ONEPIECE1176 SPOILER ⚠️ Lilith takes a special machine out of Vegapunk’s box called the “Omni-Drain Converter” (ODC for short), a device that can harness the abundant energy that exists all over E
spoilers.text: ⚠️ #ONEPIECE1176 SPOILER ⚠️ Lilith takes a special machine out of Vegapunk’s box called the “Omni-Drain Converter” (ODC for short), a device that can harness the abundant energy that exists all over Elbaph. Lilith gives Franky an upgrade. She says that she's surprised that Franky — despite having a Pacifista-level body — has never tried using anything more powerful than cola as an energy source. Lilith and Franky arrive at the school and library. Lilith uses the ODC to absorb all the heat energy, causing both buildings to freeze. She then converts the heat energy into “super heavy cola” and gives it to Franky. Franky, now powered by the “super heavy cola,” uses a new punch attack called “Strong Dexter” against an MMA (dream monster) created by Killingham. -------------------------------- Major Franky Feat!!! SUUUPEEEEEERRRRRRR!!!! 💪⭐️💥

misc.title: While we're here, let's talk about one of my favourite pieces of subtle storytelling. Brulee having a mirror devil fruit a in food-based family seems odd, until you consider that Katakuri sees all his
misc.text: While we're here, let's talk about one of my favourite pieces of subtle storytelling. Brulee having a mirror devil fruit a in food-based family seems odd, until you consider that Katakuri sees all his imperfections when he looks at her and her "crack" reminds him of his failures Tora 🍉🌱🌸⭐ Read Undead Unluck💀🍀 (@ToraTetsuya) Honestly the idea of her not knowing her kids well enough to the point she didn't even know that Katakuri ate a devil fruit was a lot more interesting of a narrative. Oh well — https://nitter.net/ToraTetsuya/status/2029228096939868546#m

misc.text: #ONEPIECE1176 - Domi Reversed Dorry and Brogy say goodbye to each other and cut each other's head. But their bodies flip back (like when Imu used Domi Reversi but in the other way) to normal self and they are now fully recovered. 👀 Source: Redon
